mapper.select: --SELECT H.HOSPITAL_ID, -- H.HOSPITAL_NAME, -- H.PHONE, -- H.ADDR, -- H.LAT, -- H.LNG, -- H.AVG_RATING, -- H.REVIEW_CNT, -- H.DEPT_LIST, -- F.FILE_URL AS THUMB_PATH --FROM TB_HOSPITAL H --LEFT JOIN TB_FILE F --ON F.REF_TYPE = 'HOSPITAL' --AND F.REF_ID = H.HOSPITAL_ID --AND F.FILE_ORDER = 0 --WHERE H.STATUS_CD = 'ACTIVE' --ORDER BY H.HOSPITAL_ID DESC SELECT H.HOSPITAL_ID, H.HOSPITAL_NAME, H.PHONE, H.ADDR, H.LAT, H.LNG, H.AVG_RATING, H.REVIEW_CNT, H.DEPT_LIST, (SELECT F.FILE_URL FROM TB_FILE F WHERE F.REF_TYPE = 'HOSPITAL' AND F.REF_ID = H.HOSPITAL_ID AND ROWNUM = 1 ) AS THUMB_PATH FROM TB_HOSPITAL H WHERE H.STATUS_CD IN ('ACTIVE', 'NORMAL') ORDER BY H.HOSPITAL_ID DESC
SELECT HOSPITAL_ID, BIZ_NO, HOSPITAL_NAME, PHONE, ADDR, LAT, LNG, AVG_RATING, REVIEW_CNT, STATUS_CD, APPROVE_DATE, HOURS_JSON, DEPT_LIST FROM TB_HOSPITAL WHERE HOSPITAL_ID = #{hospitalId}
